◇ KumoRFM Demo Studio v1.0

Checking...

◆ Welcome to KumoRFM Demo Studio

Explore the full capabilities of KumoRFM — the Relational Foundation Model that makes predictions from your business data without training.

This demo connects to the KumoRFM API and demonstrates 8 use cases:

  • Data Explorer — Load and inspect relational datasets
  • Query Lab — Write and run PQL queries interactively
  • Demand Forecast — Predict product sales in a time window
  • Churn Prediction — Identify customers at risk
  • Product Recommendation — Top-N item suggestions
  • Explainability — Understand model predictions
  • Attribute Inference — Predict missing entity attributes

⚡ Quick Start

Load a sample dataset to get started:

📈 Current Status

• Graph: Not loaded
• Tables: —
• Model: —
Inspect loaded tables, their columns, primary keys, and links between tables.

🗃 Tables & Schema

Load a dataset first to see schema.

🔗 Table Links (Foreign Keys)

No links defined.

📊 Table Preview

Select a table.

Write PQL queries interactively. Click a template below to load a pre-built query.

📜 Available PQL Templates

📝 Query Editor

📊 Results

Predict future product demand using SUM aggregation over a time window. Requires a loaded dataset with orders.

📈 Demand Forecast

Predict which users are likely to churn (place zero orders) in a given time window.

💀 Churn Prediction

Get top-N item recommendations for a user using LIST_DISTINCT with RANK TOP K.

🌟 Product Recommendation

Get natural language explanations for any prediction. The model explains which features drove the outcome.

🔍 Explain a Prediction

Predict missing entity attributes (e.g., user age, item price) using the model's understanding of relationships.

🧠 Attribute Inference

⚙ API Settings
